description: Use this API to produce a GRPG report in the active Slider diagram in the GUI. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.3. ierr = grpg(imagefile, dumfile)

parameters.name: imagefile
parameters.description: Name of the grpg file to be used. (input).

parameters.name: dumfile
parameters.description: Dummy filename; this should be initialized to “ “. (input).
